Indian River County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Indian River County, Florida

FHA loans across Indian River County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why the Vero Beach area suits FHA buyers, and how to get pre-approved.

Indian River County Home Loans

FHA loans in Indian River County, Florida

Indian River County, on Florida's Treasure Coast, centers on Vero Beach and the growing city of Sebastian. Known for its relaxed coastal lifestyle and strong retiree appeal, it blends pricier beachside properties with affordable inland communities. The FHA loan limit covers most homes in the county, so 3.5% down works well for first-time buyers, retirees, and families moving to the area.

Indian River County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Indian River County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Indian River County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). That covers most inland Indian River homes, with beachside and barrier-island properties being the main exception. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Indian River County's exact figure with HUD.

Treasure Coast value in Vero Beach and Sebastian

Inland Vero Beach, Sebastian, and Fellsmere offer the best FHA value, with homes within the loan limit — ideal for first-time buyers and retirees. Beachside properties run higher and can exceed FHA limits; for condos, confirm FHA approval via our condo guide. Pair FHA with Florida assistance to lower your upfront cost.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Indian River County

We help FHA buyers throughout Indian River County, including Vero Beach, Sebastian, and Fellsmere. Wherever you are in the county, we will explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment, and get you pre-approved fast. Start with our first-time buyer guide or estimate your payment with the FHA calculator.

Down payment help in Indian River County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Indian River County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Indian River County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Indian River County for 2026?+
Indian River County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Where does FHA work best in Indian River County?+
In inland Vero Beach, Sebastian, and Fellsmere, where homes sit within the FHA limit; beachside and barrier-island properties often run higher.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Indian River County?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — above the typical local price.
How much down payment do I need in Indian River County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Indian River County?+
Yes — Vero Beach, Sebastian, Fellsmere, and every community in the county.
